title: Backend Developer Vacancy at SAP India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at SAP India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
SAP India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Vijayawada operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About SAP India:
SAP India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SAP India!
